🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-nasif-sadnan-chowdhury-089817231/)

**Base URL:**

```
https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/

 ```

## 📂 Postman Environment Setup (Suggested Variables)

These variables should be configured in your **Postman environment** to allow dynamic and reusable requests.

### 🧾 Booking Data Variables

| Variable Name | Description | Example Value |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `firstName` | First name of the customer | John |
| `lastName` | Last name of the customer | Doe |
| `totalPrice` | Total booking price | 250 |
| `depositPaid` | Deposit status (`true` / `false`) | true |
| `checkin` | Check-in date (`YYYY-MM-DD`) | 2026-06-14 |
| `checkout` | Check-out date (`YYYY-MM-DD`) | 2026-06-16 |
| `additionalNeeds` | Extra services requested | Breakfast |

### 🔐 Authentication Variables

| Variable Name | Description | Example Value |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | API username (for login/auth endpoints) | admin |
| `password` | API password | password123 |

request.description:
[https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/](https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/)

Content-Type:

```
application/json

 ```

## 📦 Sample Successful Response

``` json
{
  "bookingid": 101,
  "booking": {
    "firstname": "Xander",
    "lastname": "Osinski",
    "totalprice": 603,
    "depositpaid": false,
    "bookingdates": {
      "checkin": "2026-06-14",
      "checkout": "2026-06-17"
    },
    "additionalneeds": "Breakfast"
  }
}

 ```

### 🔍 Response Field Descriptions

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bookingid` | Integer | Unique ID of the created booking |
| `booking.firstname` | String | First name of the customer |
| `booking.lastname` | String | Last name of the customer |
| `booking.totalprice` | Number | Total price for the booking |
| `booking.depositpaid` | Boolean | Indicates if deposit has been paid |
| `booking.bookingdates` | Object | Contains check-in and check-out dates |
| `→ checkin` | String | Check-in date (format: `YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| `→ checkout` | String | Check-out date (format: `YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| `booking.additionalneeds` | String | Any extra services or notes requested (e.g., meals) |

---

### 📘 Notes

- This response format is typical for a **successful booking creation**
    

Example Request: Create New Booking

``` json
curl --location 'https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/' \
--data '{
    "firstname" : "",
    "lastname" : "",
    "totalprice" : ,
    "depositpaid" : ,
    "bookingdates" : {
        "checkin" : "",
        "checkout" : ""
    },
    "additionalneeds" : ""
}
'

 ```

StartFragment[https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/](https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/)

Content-Type:

Plain Text

```
application/json

 ```

## 📦 Sample GET Booking Response

json

``` json
{
  "firstname": "Sincere",
  "lastname": "Smitham",
  "totalprice": 219,
  "depositpaid": true,
  "bookingdates": {
    "checkin": "2026-06-14",
      "checkout": "2026-06-17"
  },
  "additionalneeds": "capacitor"
}

 ```

---

### 🔍 Response Field Descriptions

View More

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `firstname` | String | Customer’s first name |
| `lastname` | String | Customer’s last name |
| `totalprice` | Number | Price of the booking |
| `depositpaid` | Boolean | Indicates if deposit has been paid |
| `bookingdates` | Object | Contains booking date range |
| → `checkin` | String | Start date of booking (format: `YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| → `checkout` | String | End date of booking (format: `YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| `additionalneeds` | String | Special request or service (e.g., breakfast, tools) |

---

### 📘 Notes

- This response is returned when fetching a **booking by ID** using `GET /booking/:id`.
    
- Make sure to handle `404 Not Found` if the booking ID does not exist.
    

Example Request: Get Booking Details By ID

``` json
curl --location 'https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/'

 ```

### POST Create A Token For Authentication

[https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth](https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth)

Content-Type:

```
application/json

 ```

### 📦 Sample Successful Response

``` json
{
  "token": "f29ab82a48f1186"
}

 ```

---

### 🔍 Response Field Description

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `token` | String | Authentication token for future requests |

[https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/](https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/)

Authorization:

```
Headers
Key: Cookie
Value: token={{access_token}}

 ```

Content-Type:

```
application/json

 ```

### 📦 Sample Successful Response

json

``` json
{
  "firstname": "Santiago",
  "lastname": "Gutmann",
  "totalprice": 804,
  "depositpaid": false,
  "bookingdates": {
    "checkin": "2026-06-14",
      "checkout": "2026-06-17"
  },
  "additionalneeds": "bandwidth"
}

 ```

---

### 🔍 Response Field Descriptions

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `firstname` | String | Updated first name of the customer |
| `lastname` | String | Updated last name of the customer |
| `totalprice` | Number | Updated total price for the booking |
| `depositpaid` | Boolean | Updated deposit status |
| `bookingdates` | Object | Updated check-in and check-out dates |
| → `checkin` | String | Updated check-in date (format: `YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| → `checkout` | String | Updated check-out date (format: `YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| `additionalneeds` | String | Updated extra service or request (if any) |

---

### ✅ Usage Notes

- This response is returned after a successful `PUT /booking/:id` request.
    
- Ensure that proper **authentication headers** are included for update actions.
    
- The response mirrors the updated data payload.
    

**HEADERS**

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Cookie | token= |

Bodyraw (json)

``` json
{
    "firstname" : "",
    "lastname" : "",
    "totalprice" : ,
    "depositpaid" : ,
    "bookingdates" : {
        "checkin" : "",
        "checkout" : ""
    },
    "additionalneeds" : ""
}

 ```

Example Request: Update the Booking Details

``` json
curl --location --request PUT 'https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/' \
--header 'Cookie: token=' \
--data '{
    "firstname" : "",
    "lastname" : "",
    "totalprice" : ,
    "depositpaid" : ,
    "bookingdates" : {
        "checkin" : "",
        "checkout" : ""
    },
    "additionalneeds" : ""
}
'

 ```

https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/

Content-Type:

```
application/json

 ```

### 📦 Sample Response

``` json
{
  "firstname": "Santiago",
  "lastname": "Gutmann",
  "totalprice": 804,
  "depositpaid": false,
  "bookingdates": {
    "checkin": "2025-06-28",
    "checkout": "2025-07-03"
  },
  "additionalneeds": "bandwidth"
}

 ```

---

### 🔍 Response Field Descriptions

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `firstname` | String | Customer's updated first name |
| `lastname` | String | Customer's updated last name |
| `totalprice` | Number | Updated total price for the booking |
| `depositpaid` | Boolean | Updated deposit payment status |
| `bookingdates` | Object | Contains updated booking date range |
| → `checkin` | String | Updated check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| → `checkout` | String | Updated check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `additionalneeds` | String | Updated additional needs (e.g., services or notes) |

---

### ✅ Notes

- This response is returned when you perform a `GET /booking/:id` after successfully updating the booking.
    
- The data should match the values you passed in the update request if the operation was successful.
    

Example Request: Get Booking (After Update) Response

```
curl --location 'https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/'



 ```

[https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/](https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/)

Authorization:

```
Headers
Key: Cookie
Value: token={{access_token}}

 ```

Content-Type:

```
application/json

 ```

📦 Sample Response

- Message: Created
    
- Status Code: 201
    

**HEADERS**

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Cookie | token= |

Example Request: Delete Booking Record

```
curl --location --request DELETE 'https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/' \
--header 'Cookie: token='

 ```

https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/

Content-Type:

Plain Text

```
application/json

 ```

📦 Sample Response

- Message: Not Found
    
- Status Code: 404
